name: Alpha Runner 2
short_description: Alpha Runner 2 is a challenging endless platform game with different game modes, Make your way through different obstacles and mini games that get more difficult the further you get. Show off to your friends by getting the highest score on the leaderboard.
detailed_description:
Dive into an endless, adrenaline-pumping platformer that tests your skills to the limit.
In Alpha Runner 2, every run is unique, keeping you on your toes with unpredictable scenarios that make it far tougher than it appears. Compete for the top spot on both Global and Friends-Only leaderboards, and prove you're the top runner among your peers and the world.

With randomly generated worlds, every run is a fresh challenge, preventing you from knowing what's coming next. Plus, frequent updates will introduce new obstacles and game modes, ensuring the thrill never fades. Alpha Runner 2 builds on the excitement of its predecessor, pushing the experience to new heights.

UPCOMING UPDATES:
- MORE GAMEMODES
- MORE MINIGAMES
- AND MUCH MORE!
